title: hypericum revolutum subsp. revolutum
intro: Hypericum revolutum subsp. revolutum, also known as the Chinese St. John's Wort, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiviral effects, which are attributed to the presence of hyperforin and hypericin compounds. The health benefits of Hypericum revolutum subsp. revolutum include its potential to treat anxiety, depression, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Herbal preparations of this plant are often available in the form of tea, capsules, or tinctures, which can be used to support mental and physical well-being.
